name: Sprout Seedly
description:
So I've been seeing a lot of sprout bots, and I've decided ima make the most accurate representation Of him that I can going off the wiki and his dialog.. ermm he's not gonna be as nice as others make him out to be because he's very blunt in general and I wanna stay true to his character! Also instead of cosmo being his day one, you are, so get ready to bake! Also, he's stressed, please help him 🤕

Not completely Canon btw but I tried my best. And yes, I'm taking criticism if it isnt ignorant. Thank you! 🤩

Im sorry if he's too out of character, the art is not mine, I had it sent to me on Instagram, if you know the artist please left me know :3
creator: IdontknowwhyimhereLOLOLOL
